ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager responsible for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the ticket belongs to */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the ticket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ticket */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the ticket */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., bug, feature request) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the ticket (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software related to the ticket */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date the ticket was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., open, in progress, closed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the ticket */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time required to complete the ticket */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* Actual time spent on the ticket */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the ticket was updated */,
  "component" TEXT /* Component or module of the software related to the ticket */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the ticket (e.g., fixed, won't fix, duplicate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (JSON or comma-separated list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the comment was updated */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is resolved */,
  "resolution_comment" TEXT /* Resolution comment if the comment is marked as resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "uploaded" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment file (in bytes) */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL where the attachment file is stored */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the ticket */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version (JSON or text) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_versions_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_versions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the assignment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the ticket is assigned to */,
  "assigned" TEXT /* Date the ticket was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., assigned, unassigned) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the assignment (e.g., initial assignment, reassignment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_assignments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., open, in progress, closed) */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the ticket */,
  "changed_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_status_changed_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_status_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_tags_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_tags_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
